title: Smoky Baked Russian White Fish Bake
description: A traditional Russian dish featuring white fish baked in a wood-fired oven with a smoky flavor, wrapped in lotus leaves for a nostalgic and pungent taste. This egg-free friendly recipe is perfect for a light dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Place a white fish fillet in the center of each lotus leaf.
Brush the top of each fish fillet with lemon juice and olive oil.
Sprinkle the smoky spice mixture evenly over the fish fillets.
Fold the lotus leaves over the fish to form a tight packet.
Place the packets in a baking dish and bake for 12 minutes.
Remove the packets from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the fish hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
